PR3_SMOKE_V1 HARNESS_START arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 USER_START arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT write PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT getpid PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT sched_affinity PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT proc_uptime PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT splice_pipe PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT tcp_fork_loopback PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT uname_sysname PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 ASSERT uname_machine PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 USER_PASS arch=riscv64
PR3_SMOKE_V1 HARNESS_PASS arch=riscv64 status=0
PR3_SMOKE_V1 SHUTDOWN arch=riscv64
